summary.status: The primary action can be traced to an authoritative resolver snapshot, but the CEO snapshot does not yet include field-level provenance or a structured scoring trace for every displayed action.

directly_sourced_fields.source: filesystem stat/read status for build_ceo_truth_snapshot_v1.mjs SOURCE_FILES

synthesized_or_inferred_fields.logic: count normalized client records where lifecycle_stage equals audit_requested
count normalized client records where lifecycle_stage equals proposal_sent
count clients with paid-like payment status or positive business.stafford_revenue_earned
count paid-like clients whose shopifixer.fix_status equals not_started
count clients with lifecycle/fix status in progress, active, qa, or proof_ready
count clients with lifecycle/fix status completed
count clients where abando.installed is true
count installed clients with merchant revenue recovered over 0
builder assembles strings from revenue bottleneck, pipeline counts, paid client count, and unavailable proof/review/referral metrics
builder-written warnings from top-5 partial status, lead count, and dashboard primary focus
builder derives revenue_gap, primary_focus, open_work_items, and client_count from supporting files
builder synthesizes and ranks candidates from primary action, dashboard primary focus, current client next action, unit work next actions, and lead next actions
static wording based on top-5 status

fields_not_traceable_to_single_authority.reason: Synthesized locally in the CEO snapshot builder; no governed top-5 action artifact exists.
Hard-coded null; snapshot warns proof metrics are not directly represented in current runtime truth.
Hard-coded null; snapshot warns review metrics are not directly represented in current runtime truth.
Hard-coded null; snapshot warns referral metrics are not directly represented in current runtime truth.
Set to unknown because no governed staleness threshold exists.
Human-readable synthesized strings without structured field-level trace objects.
Builder-authored messages, not direct business truth.
Uses dashboard revenue_gaps[0].gap, which assumes the first gap is the relevant primary-action gap.
Present in current CEO JSON and traceable to primary_action_snapshot_v1.json, but not emitted by the inspected builder source.

primary_action_logic.ceo_snapshot_behavior: build_ceo_truth_snapshot_v1.mjs imports the primary action from primary_action_snapshot_v1.json; it does not select the winner itself.
primary_action_logic.candidate_sort: descending priority_score after scoreUnit; first candidate wins

score_components.condition: unit.type == opportunity and unit.stage includes proposal
unit.type == action and unit.next_action includes follow up

current_winner.reason: Open ShopiFixer opportunity in proposal stage, owned by Ross, with next action to follow up and close payment.

non_selection_inputs.effect: Adds matching client context, revenue gap evidence, and Stafford/merchant revenue context; does not select winner.
Provides primary focus fallback/context; does not select winner.
Controls risk wording and confidence interpretation; does not select winner.
Adds UX evidence; does not select winner.

truth_changes_that_select_different_prim: Change that unit type away from opportunity.
Change that unit stage so it no longer includes proposal.
Change that unit domain_id away from shopifixer.
Change that unit owner away from ross.
Change that unit next_action so it no longer includes follow up or close payment.
Change that unit status away from open.
Add an equal 100-point candidate that appears before the current winner in candidate order.
Remove all open_work items, which causes the resolver to emit No active unit of work found.

cockpit_can_explain_why.ui_explanation: The cockpit page displays primary action source/confidence/next step and top-5 cards with evidence, but it does not display a structured resolver score trace or field-source map.

smallest_repair.description: Add decision trace and field source maps to the resolver and CEO snapshot builder, then regenerate snapshots. Add cockpit rendering only if visible explainability is required.
steps: Update resolve_primary_action_v1.mjs to emit decision_trace with scored candidates, score components, winner, alternatives, tie behavior, and source fields.
Update build_ceo_truth_snapshot_v1.mjs to copy primary_action.decision_trace and emit ceo_snapshot.field_sources for every displayed CEO field.
Mark proof_needed, review_needed, and referral_needed as unavailable with source notes instead of unexplained nulls.
Preserve primary action execution fields from primary_action_snapshot_v1.json when building the CEO snapshot.
Replace blocker-only strings or supplement them with structured blocker_trace entries.
Optionally update cockpit page to render decision trace and source map.

answers.1_direct_authoritative_fields: Revenue summary fields from operator dashboard snapshot, primary action fields from primary_action_snapshot_v1.json, source metadata, daemon state, and current execution fields in the JSON.
answers.2_synthesized_fields: Pipeline counts, fulfillment counts, Abando counts, blockers, warnings, top-5 actions, confidence wording, and primary-action context.
answers.3_untraceable_fields: Top-5 actions, proof/review/referral needed metrics, stale truth status, blocker strings, warning strings, first revenue gap selection, and builder/snapshot-drifted execution fields.
answers.4_primary_action_logic: The resolver scores unit_work_snapshot_v1.json open_work[] items, caps scores at 100, sorts by descending score, and selects the first candidate.
answers.5_truth_changes_for_different_primary_ac: Change unit_work_snapshot_v1.json open_work[] so the current ShopiFixer proposal follow-up no longer scores highest, add an equal/higher candidate before it, or remove all open work.
answers.6_can_cockpit_explain_why: Partially. Evidence exists and some is displayed, but no structured score trace or field-source map is visible.
answers.7_smallest_implementation_slice: Add decision_trace to primary_action_snapshot and field_sources/structured blocker traces to CEO snapshot builder; regenerate snapshots; optionally render the trace in cockpit.
answers.8_files_to_change: resolve_primary_action_v1.mjs, build_ceo_truth_snapshot_v1.mjs, generated primary action snapshot, generated CEO snapshot JSON/MD, optionally cockpit page.
answers.9_files_not_to_change: Commercial flows, ShopiFixer UI, Abando, checkout, Stripe, lifecycle authority, lead state machines, revenue logic, and runtime truth registries.
